You’re in.

Now grab the desktop app.

The Chrome extension lets you share + save AI chats. The desktop app runs 10 parallel agents, syncs your codebase, and shares live sessions with your team.

Download for Mac — FreeUniversal build · Apple Silicon & Intel · 25¢ free trial
chatgpt.com
You
Help me refactor this auth flow — the session refresh logic is duplicated across three middleware files. Should I extract it?
ChatGPT
Yes — extract refreshSession() into lib/auth/refresh.ts and import it from each middleware. The three copies have drifted; this consolidates error handling in one place.
VVeronum
Run as 10 agentsPro
Share this chat live↗
Save to version history↗
Undo last AI edit⌘Z
Get Veronum Desktop →
Shared — link copied

Click the V on any AI conversation → share, save, undo, or run as 10 agents in Veronum.

How the funnel works.

01

Click the V on any AI chat

The Veronum extension drops a small button on every ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, and Perplexity conversation. Click → share, save, undo, or hand off to 10 parallel agents.

02

Share live with one click

The share link goes straight to your clipboard. Paste it in Slack, an email, a DM. Your teammate clicks and sees the conversation rendered cleanly — no screenshots, no copy-paste.

03

Open in Veronum Desktop

The desktop app is where the real work happens. Run 10 agents at once, get live shared coding sessions with teammates, version history per turn, and one-click undo across your codebase.

Works with
ChatGPTClaudeCursorGeminiGrokPerplexityVS CodeWarpZed

Ready to stop switching tabs?

Every account starts with 25¢ of free usage — no card needed. After that, $25/month or pay-as-you-go at 3×. Cancel any time through Stripe.
